rolePick.title: What brings you here?
rolePick.body: Pick the role that matches how you will use Tutorstr. You cannot change this later for the same identity.
rolePick.tutorBody: Publish your profile and schedule, accept student requests, run lessons.
rolePick.studentBody: Discover tutors, request lessons, track your progress.

roleDescription.tutor: Publish profile, schedule, and lessons. Accept or decline booking requests.
roleDescription.student: Discover tutors, request lessons, and track your learning progress.
